source: Ali et al. 2023, Global Heart, PMC10453961

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Weight loss and dyspnea improvement with dapagliflozin added to furosemide

key_quotes: The study included 100 type 2 diabetic patients who were admitted with decompensated heart failure. The study population was randomly divided into two arms.
With dapagliflozin, there was a statistically significant difference between the two groups regarding the change in body weight and body mass index.
source_evidence.notes: Paper indexed as 'Case Reports' by PubMed. Duration of hospital stay not explicitly stated in weeks. Phase not reported. Blinding not described. Age range not specified in abstract.

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Composite of worsening heart failure (hospitalization or urgent visit for IV therapy) or cardiovascular death

key_quotes: In this phase 3, placebo-controlled trial, we randomly assigned 4744 patients with New York Heart Association class II, III, or IV heart failure and an ejection fraction of 40% or less to receive either dapagliflozin (at a dose of 10 mg once daily) or placebo
Over a median of 18.2 months, the primary outcome occurred in 386 of 2373 patients (16.3%) in the dapagliflozin group and in 502 of 2371 patients (21.2%) in the placebo group

extraction_ground_truth.design: Pre-specified subgroup analysis of multinational randomized placebo-controlled trial
extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Composite of ≥50% decline in eGFR, end-stage kidney disease, or kidney/cardiovascular death

key_quotes: A total of 4,304 participants were randomized to dapagliflozin 10 mg daily or placebo.
HF patients (n = 468; 11%) were older and had more coronary disease
Dapagliflozin reduced the risk of the primary outcome equally in patients with HF (HR: 0.58) and without HF (HR: 0.62)
source_evidence.notes: N_total/N_active/N_placebo are for the parent DAPA-CKD trial. The HF subgroup was 468 patients (n not split by arm in abstract). Ali 2023 used total trial N (2,152/2,152).

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Dual primary: (1) mean NT-proBNP at 6 and 12 weeks; (2) proportion with ≥5-point KCCQ increase or ≥20% NT-proBNP decrease

key_quotes: DEFINE-HF was an investigator-initiated, multi-center, randomized controlled trial of HF patients with left ventricular ejection fraction ≤40%, NYHA class II-III, eGFR ≥30
263 patients were randomized to dapagliflozin 10 mg daily or placebo for 12 weeks
Dual primary outcomes were (1) mean NT-proBNP and (2) proportion of patients with ≥5-point increase in KCCQ-OS or ≥20% decrease in NT-proBNP
source_evidence.notes: N per arm estimated as 131/132 (263 total, 1:1 randomization). NCT02653482.

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Change in Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire Clinical Summary Score (KCCQ-CS) at 12 weeks

key_quotes: In this multicenter, randomized trial of patients with HFpEF (NCT03030235), we evaluated whether dapagliflozin improves the primary endpoint of KCCQ-CS at 12 weeks
324 patients were randomized to dapagliflozin or placebo
Dapagliflozin improved KCCQ-CS (effect size, 5.8 points, 95% CI 2.3-9.2, P = 0.001)

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Change in peak oxygen consumption (peakVO2) at 1 and 3 months

key_quotes: In this multicentre, randomized, double-blind clinical trial, 90 stable patients with HFrEF were randomly assigned to receive either dapagliflozin (n = 45) or placebo (n = 45)
The primary outcome was a change in peak oxygen consumption (peakVO2) at 1 and 3 months
The mean age was 67.1 ± 10.7 years, 69 (76.7%) were men
source_evidence.notes: Duration is 3 months (~12 weeks). Age eligibility criteria not explicitly stated in abstract but mean age 67.1 years. Ali 2023 does not specify dose for this study.

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Change in left ventricular end-systolic volume (LVESV) by cardiac MRI

key_quotes: We randomized 56 patients with T2DM and HF with LV systolic dysfunction to dapagliflozin 10 mg daily or placebo for 1 year
The primary end point was difference in LV end-systolic volume (LVESV) using cardiac MRI

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Composite of worsening heart failure (unplanned hospitalization or urgent visit for HF) or cardiovascular death

key_quotes: We randomly assigned 6263 patients with heart failure and a left ventricular ejection fraction of more than 40% to receive dapagliflozin (at a dose of 10 mg once daily) or matching placebo
Over a median of 2.3 years, the primary outcome occurred in 512 of 3131 patients (16.4%) in the dapagliflozin group and in 610 of 3132 patients (19.5%) in the placebo group
source_evidence.notes: Duration ~120 weeks (median 2.3 years). Age eligibility ≥40 per trial design (NCT03619213).

extraction_ground_truth.primary_efficacy_outcome: Co-primary: (1) MACE (noninferiority); (2) composite of cardiovascular death or hospitalization for heart failure (superiority)

key_quotes: We randomly assigned patients with type 2 diabetes who had or were at risk for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease to receive either dapagliflozin or placebo
We evaluated 17,160 patients, including 10,186 without atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, who were followed for a median of 4.2 years
dapagliflozin did result in a lower rate of cardiovascular death or hospitalization for heart failure (4.9% vs. 5.8%; HR 0.83, 95% CI 0.73-0.95, P=0.005)
source_evidence.notes: Duration ~218 weeks (median 4.2 years). This is a T2DM cardiovascular outcomes trial, not a dedicated HF trial. Ali 2023 included it for HF hospitalization outcomes. N_total is total trial N, not HF subgroup.
